072211Z MAY 26 HYDROPAC 1353/26. NORTH PACIFIC. NORTHERN MARIANA ISLANDS. DUE TO PASSAGE OF TYPHOON SINLAKU: 1. THE FOLLOWING PORTS ARE REOPENED: A. SAIPAN (15-13.56N 145-44.25E). B. APRA HARBOR (13-27.20N 144-39.21E). C. ROTA HARBOR (14-08.35N 145-08.09E). D. TINIAN (14-57.95N 145-37.26E). 2. CURRENT PORT INFORMATION CAN BE FOUND AT HTTPS://WWW.NAVCEN.USCG.GOV/PORT-STATUS. 3. CANCEL HYDROPAC 1174/26. 4. CANCEL THIS MSG 102209Z MAY 26.

011823Z MAY 26 HYDROPAC 1296/26. MARITIME CONTENT DISSEMINATION PORTAL (MCDP) ADVISORY NGA IS AWARE OF AN ISSUE RESULTING IN A LOGIN LOOP FOR SOME USERS ATTEMPTING TO ACCESS NGA???S MARITIME CONTENT DISSEMINATION PORTAL (HTTPS://MARITIME.GEO.NGA.MIL). NGA IS INVESTIGATING FURTHER. AT THIS TIME, IMPACTED USERS SHOULD ENSURE THEIR EMAIL ADDRESS HAS BEEN ADDED TO THEIR GEOAXIS PROFILE AT HTTPS://PORTAL.GEOAXIS.GS.MIL/USER. USERS ARE ALSO ADVISED TO CLEAR THEIR WEB BROWSER CACHE AND TRY ANOTHER WEB BROWSER. ESYNC (HTTPS://ESYNC.NGA.MIL) REMAINS FULLY AVAILABLE AND CAN BE USED TO UPDATE CHARTS AND ENC REGIONS PREVIOUSLY RECEIVED FROM NGA. IF YOU REQUIRE FURTHER ASSISTANCE, INCLUDING REQUESTS FOR DIRECT DOWNLOADS VIA DOD SAFE, PLEASE CONTACT MARHELP@NGA.MIL.

301023Z APR 26 HYDROPAC 1288/26. ANDAMAN SEA. BAY OF BENGAL. INDIA. 1. HAZARDOUS OPERATIONS 0430Z TO 0630Z AND 0830Z TO 1030Z DAILY 06, 13 AND 20 MAY IN AREA BOUND BY 11-40.00N 092-27.00E, 11-43.00N 092-16.00E, 11-52.00N 092-19.00E, 11-48.00N 092-29.00E. 2. CANCEL THIS MSG 201130Z MAY 26.

171751Z JUL 25 HYDROPAC 1823/25. CANCELLED ELECTRONIC NAVIGATIONAL CHART (ENC) ADVISORY. USERS OF NGA ENC PRODUCTS ARE ADVISED OF POTENTIAL UNINTENDED ECDIS BEHAVIOR WHEN PROCESSING CANCELLED CHARTS, INCLUDING REINSTALLATION OF RECENTLY CANCELLED CHARTS ON SOME SYSTEMS WITHOUT OBVIOUS ERROR OR WARNING MESSAGES. NGA HAS CONFIRMED THIS ISSUE AFFECTS NAVY VMS 9.5 AND RAYTHEON ANSCHUTZ SYNAPSIS NX SYSTEMS. THIS ISSUE DOES NOT AFFECT NAVY ECDIS. OTHER SYSTEMS ARE CURRENTLY UNASSESSED. USERS MAY REFERENCE NGAS ENC CATALOG (GLOBAL OR REGIONAL PRODUCT LISTINGS) FOR A LIST OF CANCELLED CHARTS WHICH SHOULD BE UNINSTALLED FROM ECDIS. NGAS GLOBAL ENC CATALOG IS AVAILABLE ON HTTPS://MCDP.NGA.MIL, WITH REGIONAL ENC PRODUCT LISTING SPREADSHEETS CONTAINED WITHIN EACH REGIONS ZIP ON ESYNC, NGAS WEBSITES, AND WORLDCOVER DVD. USERS MAY FILTER PRODUCT LISTINGS FOR EDITION OF CXL AND SORT BY ISSUE DATE TO SEE MOST RECENT CANCELLATIONS. CHARTS CANCELLED WITHIN THE LAST 90 DAYS ARE ACTIVELY DISSEMINATED BY NGA AND MOST LIKELY CANDIDATES FOR INADVERTENT REINSTALLATION. NGA IS CONSULTING WITH THE USER COMMUNITY TO ASSESS POSSIBLE CHANGES TO THE CANCELLED CHART DISSEMINATION PROCESS TO MITIGATE THIS POTENTIAL UNINTENDED ECDIS BEHAVIOR.
